interface.longDescription: Rhea brings the Rhea sovereign model orchestration workflow into Codex as skills for model routing, Dreamer/Doubter/Decider debates, remote pairing, sessions, and image generation. MCP packaging is intentionally not advertised until the Node runtime is portable in the marketplace bundle.
